title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and library for downloading, building and running large language models locally with minimal setup.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK wrapping Ollama’s REST API for easy model inference and chat inside Python apps.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers to interact with the local Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama models as LLM and chat components for chains and agents.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama WebUI) for chatting with local models, file uploads, multimodal vision and admin controls.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library providing typed wrappers and async methods for the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for integrating local Ollama models into Rails or Ruby scripts.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced command-line tool written in Go that adds conversation history, prompt templates and batch jobs atop the official CLI.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-style code-completion plugin using a local Ollama model instead of cloud services.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local LLM chat powered by Ollama into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama and optional WebUI onto Kubernetes clusters with GPU node selection.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama team letting you use local models as generators or rankers in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n
summary: Native n8n node that enables no-code workflows to query Ollama models for tasks like summarization, translation or classification.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that containerizes Ollama and exposes functions for CI pipelines to run local LLM tests or generate docs.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot built with Bolt JS that answers channel mentions using a configurable local Ollama model.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit component template that embeds a chat interface connected to Ollama, useful for quick internal demos.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# .NET SDK providing strongly-typed HTTP client and async enumerable streaming for Ollama endpoints.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a side-panel chat and commands to summarize notes or brainstorm using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-docker-cuda
summary: Official CUDA-enabled Docker image and compose stack for running GPU-accelerated Ollama containers.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial but actively maintained Rust crate offering async/tokio bindings and typed request/response structs for Ollama.
